title: Claude Code SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Canonical schema for Claude Code 2026 SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. 14 official fields plus claude-config iteration-control extension fields (max_iterations, halt_condition, halt_conditions, on_halt, loop_safe), tier-preset extension fields (tiers, default_tier), and severity extension fields (severity, finding_levels).

then.$comment: P1-c (issue #458): iterative skills (max_iterations declared, or loop_safe == true) MUST declare halt_conditions so a self-loop is forced to terminate explicitly.

ref_docs.description: Skill-defined alias keys resolving to reference/*.md files inside the skill's directory.

deep_checks.description: Opt-in flag for deeper verification passes (extra lint, full build, integrity checks).

max_files.description: Advisory cap on the number of files the skill should enumerate or modify in a single invocation.

type.description: Halt category. success=terminal success, failure=stop-on-error, limit=iteration/resource cap, user=human signal, fallback=escalation.

expr.description: Condition expression. Prefer regex or symbolic form for deterministic signals; natural language otherwise.

name.description: Skill identifier. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. Max 64 chars.

description.description: Skill trigger description. Max 1024 chars. >=100 chars recommended for trigger quality.

when_to_use.description: Plain-language hint of when this skill applies.

argument-hint.description: Usage hint shown to the user, e.g., "<file-or-directory> [--verbose]".

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, the model cannot auto-invoke this skill (user-only).

user-invocable.description: When true, the user can invoke this skill via slash command.

allowed-tools.description: Tools the skill is allowed to call. Scalar ("Bash(git *)") or array form.

model.description: Preferred model identifier (e.g., haiku, sonnet, opus).

context.description: Context strategy. "fork" runs the skill in a forked context window.

agent.description: Agent name(s) this skill prefers to delegate to.

hooks.description: Hook bindings scoped to this skill.

paths.description: Glob path patterns this skill applies to (comma-separated string or array).

shell.description: Preferred shell when the skill runs commands.

max_iterations.description: Iteration-control extension (claude-config): maximum number of self-loops before the skill is forced to halt.

halt_condition.description: Iteration-control extension (claude-config, legacy): plain-language condition that stops the iteration loop early. Superseded by halt_conditions; both accepted during P1 grace period.

halt_conditions.description: Iteration-control extension (claude-config): structured halt conditions. Either a single-string form (legacy compatibility for one-shot rename from halt_condition) or an array of {type, expr} entries. Replaces halt_condition; both keys accepted during the P1 grace period.

on_halt.description: Iteration-control extension (claude-config): action to take when halt_condition fires or max_iterations is reached.

loop_safe.description: Iteration-control extension (claude-config): true when the skill is safe to run inside an autonomous /loop, false when it must exit the loop before acting.

tiers.description: Tier-preset extension (claude-config): per-tier loading hints for skills whose SKILL.md body exceeds 5 KB. See global/skills/_policy.md.

default_tier.description: Tier-preset extension (claude-config): tier applied when the caller omits --tier. Defaults to 'standard' when this field is absent.

severity.description: Severity extension (claude-config): primary severity tier this skill triages at. S1 = block-merge, S2 = review-required, S3 = advisory. Code-review domain only.

finding_levels.description: Severity extension (claude-config): set of severity levels this skill emits findings at. Subset of {S1, S2, S3}; non-empty and unique.
